title: HSSEQ Executive #66120
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Logistics Service Supplier
  • Position Title: HSSEQ Executive
  • Working Location: West- Jurong Island (Company Transportation Provided from MRT stations located in the West, North, North-East, South, and East)
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Mon-Fri, 8AM-5:45PM)
  • Salary Package: Up to SGD 3600 + Attendance Allowance + Incentive (Attendance + Retention) + AWS + Performance Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in establishing and maintaining Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) documentation and records in compliance with relevant legislation.
  • Review method statements and risk assessments as required, ensuring alignment with the WSH Act and subsidiary regulations.
  • Conduct workplace inspections and audits to verify adherence to WSH legislation, company safety management systems, and client requirements.
  • Perform daily checks to identify unsafe conditions or practices on site.
  • Support and recommend the implementation of practical measures to address and correct unsafe conditions and work practices.
  • Prepare reports for HSSEQ internal and external audits, client and authority assessments, table-top exercises, emergency and security drills, and ensure prompt closure of safety actions.
  • Liaise with vendors and contractors to maintain emergency and fire safety equipment, and perform monthly fire alarm testing.
  • Plan, develop, and deliver HSSEQ training sessions for staff, visitors, contractors, and hauliers.
  • Respond to non-conformities, near misses, and incidents; provide operational support, investigate root causes, make recommendations, and follow up on corrective actions.
  • Oversee site security and manage the contracted security agency providing 24-hour services.
  • Perform additional duties as assigned by superiors and cover responsibilities during team member absences.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Min. 2 years experience in a warehouse & logistics, manufacturing, petrochemical and/or industrial environment
  • Possess Certificate in Advanced Certificate in Workplace Safety and Health (Level B) or any relevant safety certificates
  • Have Confine Space Assessor Certificate / ISO 9001, 14001, 45001 Internal Auditor Trained is a plus
  • Attended the WSH Coordinator Refresher Course
  • Able to work at height and climb cat ladders
  • Proficiency in MS office applications and other in-house software
  • Own a motorcycle or Class 3 driving license is a plus

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #66120 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
